positive: Minimalist vector illustration design featuring a stylized constellation map, connecting various geometric star nodes in deep sapphire blue and brilliant gold leaf accents. The composition is centered, forming an abstract yet recognizable group of celestial figures (like a wise owl or soaring bird) using only clean lines and negative space. Style should be elegant, modern geometric art, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Use high contrast, flat graphic elements with metallic highlights. Centered composition, seamless print texture, clean silhouette, cosmic, starry night feel.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, bokeh, gradient, messy, cluttered, noisy, grainy, blur, text, watermark, logos, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, muted colors, low contrast, abstract grunge
